captions.text: recording restarts the scene to stay in sync
drag the waveform to fix mic latency

lines.text: Open the takes tab and record your narration, one scene at a time.
Recording restarts the scene, so your voice lines up with the action.
Keep as many takes as you like; the studio plays the one you pick.
If the mic lags, drag the waveform until the words land on the action.
